title: Duplicate ISBN returns 500 instead of 409
evidence: app.go:104-111 createBook — the isbn column is UNIQUE (app.go:59); a duplicate INSERT fails and is reported as generic 500 'Failed to create book'
suggestion: Detect the UNIQUE-constraint error and return 409 Conflict with a clear message

title: updateBook echoes id as string, createBook as int
evidence: app.go:229-235 returns c.Param("id") (string) as "id"; app.go:119-125 createBook returns the int LastInsertId — inconsistent JSON typing across endpoints
suggestion: Return the stored int id from updateBook (e.g. reuse existingBook.ID) for a consistent response shape

title: Production DB file is created in the current working directory
evidence: app.go:43 initDB() hard-codes ./books.db; not configurable via env and not documented as a side effect
suggestion: Allow the DB path to be set via an env var (like PORT) and note the created file in README
